# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Allowed columns for sorting
     */
    private const ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS = [
        'name',
        'price',
        'created_at',
        'category',
    ];

    /**
     * Allowed sort directions
     */
    private const ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS = [
        'asc',
        'desc',
    ];

    /**
     * Allowed columns for searching
     */
    private const ALLOWED_SEARCH_COLUMNS = [
        'name',
        'category',
        'description',
    ];

    /**
     * Search products by name, category, and price range.
     */
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'min_price' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'max_price' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'sort_by' => 'nullable|string',
            'sort_direction' => 'nullable|string',
            'search_column' => 'nullable|string',
            'keyword' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'per_page' => 'nullable|integer|min:1|max:100',
        ]);

        $bindings = [];
        $conditions = [];

        // Filter by product name using parameterized query
        if (!empty($validated['name'])) {
            $conditions[] = 'LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER(?)';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $validated['name'] . '%';
        }

        // Filter by category using parameterized query
        if (!empty($validated['category'])) {
            $conditions[] = 'LOWER(c.name) = LOWER(?)';
            $bindings[] = $validated['category'];
        }

        // Filter by minimum price using parameterized query
        if (isset($validated['min_price'])) {
            $conditions[] = 'p.price >= ?';
            $bindings[] = (float) $validated['min_price'];
        }

        // Filter by maximum price using parameterized query
        if (isset($validated['max_price'])) {
            $conditions[] = 'p.price <= ?';
            $bindings[] = (float) $validated['max_price'];
        }

        // Flexible keyword search on an allowlisted column
        if (!empty($validated['keyword']) && !empty($validated['search_column'])) {
            $searchColumn = $validated['search_column'];

            // Allowlist the search column to prevent SQL injection in non-parameterizable fragment
            if (!in_array($searchColumn, self::ALLOWED_SEARCH_COLUMNS, true)) {
                return response()->json([
                    'error' => 'Invalid search column. Allowed columns: ' . implode(', ', self::ALLOWED_SEARCH_COLUMNS),
                ], 422);
            }

            $conditions[] = "LOWER(p.{$searchColumn}) LIKE LOWER(?)";
            $bindings[] = '%' . $validated['keyword'] . '%';
        }

        // Build the WHERE clause
        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        // Allowlist sort column to prevent SQL injection in non-parameterizable fragment
        $sortBy = 'p.created_at'; // default
        if (!empty($validated['sort_by'])) {
            if (!in_array($validated['sort_by'], self::ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS, true)) {
                return response()->json([
                    'error' => 'Invalid sort column. Allowed columns: ' . implode(', ', self::ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS),
                ], 422);
            }
            $sortBy = 'p.' . $validated['sort_by'];
        }

        // Allowlist sort direction to prevent SQL injection in non-parameterizable fragment
        $sortDirection = 'desc'; // default
        if (!empty($validated['sort_direction'])) {
            if (!in_array(strtolower($validated['sort_direction']), self::ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS, true)) {
                return response()->json([
                    'error' => 'Invalid sort direction. Allowed values: asc, desc',
                ], 422);
            }
            $sortDirection = strtolower($validated['sort_direction']);
        }

        $perPage = $validated['per_page'] ?? 20;

        // Build the full query with parameterized bindings
        $sql = "
            SELECT
                p.id,
                p.name,
                p.description,
                p.price,
                p.sku,
                p.stock_quantity,
                p.image_url,
                c.name AS category_name,
                p.created_at,
                p.updated_at
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            {$whereClause}
            ORDER BY {$sortBy} {$sortDirection}
        ";

        // Count query for pagination using parameterized bindings
        $countSql = "
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            {$whereClause}
        ";

        $totalResult = DB::select(DB::raw($countSql), $bindings);
        $total = $totalResult[0]->total ?? 0;

        // Add pagination using parameterized bindings
        $page = max(1, (int) $request->input('page', 1));
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $perPage;

        $sql .= ' LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';
        $paginatedBindings = array_merge($bindings, [$perPage, $offset]);

        $products = DB::select(DB::raw($sql), $paginatedBindings);

        return response()->json([
            'data' => $products,
            'pagination' => [
                'total' => (int) $total,
                'per_page' => $perPage,
                'current_page' => $page,
                'last_page' => (int) ceil($total / $perPage),
                'from' => $total > 0 ? $offset + 1 : null,
                'to' => $total > 0 ? min($offset + $perPage, $total) : null,
            ],
            'filters_applied' => array_filter([
                'name' => $validated['name'] ?? null,
                'category' => $validated['category'] ?? null,
                'min_price' => $validated['min_price'] ?? null,
                'max_price' => $validated['max_price'] ?? null,
                'keyword' => $validated['keyword'] ?? null,
                'search_column' => $validated['search_column'] ?? null,
                'sort_by' => $validated['sort_by'] ?? 'created_at',
                'sort_direction' => $sortDirection,
            ]),
        ]);
    }
}
